day_trace.speech: Listen up, everybody. I'm about to make a claim that none of you are going to believe, and that's exactly the point. I'm not going to tell you what I saw. Because the beautiful thing about a <預言家> claim is that it could be real, it could be fake, it could be a desperate last move from a wolf who saw the noose tightening. Or maybe I'm just a <皮匠> who wanted to make a grand speech before being put out of my misery. You'll never know. And that's the most beautiful thing of all.
